tkinter.ttk/Treeview/heading.name: heading
tkinter.ttk/Treeview/heading.description: Query or modify the heading options for the specified column. If kw is not given, returns a dict of the heading option values. If option is specified then the value for that option is returned. Otherwise, sets the options to the corresponding values. The valid options/values are: text: textThe text to display in the column heading. image: imageNameSpecifies an image to display to the right of the column heading. anchor: anchorSpecifies how the heading text should be aligned. tkinter.ttk/Notebook/hide.name: hide
tkinter.ttk/Notebook/hide.description: Hides the tab specified by tab_id. The tab will not be displayed, but the associated window remains managed by the notebook and its configuration remembered. Hidden tabs may be restored with the add() command.
